mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses (user_id, recipient_name, phone, region, postal_code, detail_address, address, is_default, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipientName}, #{phone}, #{region}, #{postalCode}, #{detailAddress}, #{address}, #{isDefault}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET recipient_name = #{recipientName}, phone = #{phone}, region = #{region}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, address = #{address}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
